message:
🐛 Fix 141 install missions with invalid Helm repo URLs (#308)

* fix(generator): add Helm repo URL validation and prevent hallucinated URLs

- Add Artifact Hub API lookup to find real published Helm chart URLs
- Add kustomize detection (kustomization.yaml) as install method
- Add post-generation Helm repo URL validation (fetch index.yaml)
- Auto-fix bad URLs using Artifact Hub fallback when available
- Reject missions with unvalidatable Helm URLs and no fallback
- Strengthen LLM system prompt: only use Helm when chart context present
- Add explicit "NO HELM CHART FOUND" marker in prompt when applicable
- Export validateHelmRepoUrl, findArtifactHubChart, findKustomize

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(missions): regenerate 55 install missions with validated URLs

First batch of regenerated missions using the improved generator:
- All Helm repo URLs validated against index.yaml
- Artifact Hub used as source of truth for chart URLs
- Projects without Helm charts use kubectl/kustomize instead
- Quality gate still applied (schema, security, commands, verification)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(missions): fix remaining 83 install missions with bad Helm URLs

- 33 missions: fixed URL using validated Artifact Hub chart repos
- 50 missions: rewritten from Helm to kubectl (no Helm chart exists)
- Score mission: fixed to use CLI tool install instead of Helm
- Generator: fix validateHelmRepoUrl to follow redirects
- All 186 missions now have validated install instructions

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
